title: odontosoria flexuosa
intro: Odontosoria flexuosa, also known as the flexible polypody or flexible fern, is a species of epiphytic fern native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Odontosoria flexuosa include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Odontosoria flexuosa is often used in decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in traditional remedies in the form of poultices and salves.
